name: workflow-orchestrator
description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration plugin for Claude Code — 100% mirrors Dynamic Workflows experience. Auto-decompose complex goals into DAG-based parallel sub-tasks with real-time monitoring, adversarial verification, checkpoint/resume, and 5 built-in templates. Integrated with Superpowers for TDD discipline. Works with ANY Claude Code backend (Anthropic, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, LiteLLM).
